titleStmt.title: SII 16.179: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 179. (A.R. No. 349 of 1905.) PEDDAMUḌIYAM, JAMMALAMADUGU TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the wall in the courtyard of the Vīrabhadrēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1473, Virōdhikṛit, Śrāvaṇa ba. 8, Sunday, Kṛishṇajayanti, corresponding to 1551 A.D., July 26, °12.

It records a gift of income derived from the taxes such as juṁju, nārasam, mōṭupalaka, etc., payable to the vīramushṭis by the Tammaḷa and other communities of the village Brāhmalamuḍiyyam alias Trilōchanapuram, to god Sōmēśvara of the same place, by China-Basuvaya, son of Vīramushṭi Būmaya of Ghanagiri. The village is said to be in Rēnāṭi-sīma, a subdivision of Ghaṇḍikōṭa-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁ
bbulu 1473 Agunēṭi virōdhakṛtusaṁvatsa
ra śrāvaṇa ba 8 śrīmadrājādhirāja
rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī vīra sa
dāsivadēvamahārāyalugāru vidyā(na)
nagaramaṁddu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhuḍai pṛ
thivi sāmrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍḍagānu ghaṁḍi
kōṭarājyaṁlōni rēnāṭisīmalōnu trilōca
napurānku pratināmamaina brā(ṁ)hmalamu
ḍiyyaṁ yajanādiṣaṭkarmaniratulaina pada
vākkapramāṇagnulaina sarvaguṇasaṁppaRead padavākyapramāṇajñulaina
nnulaina nūṁṭayenamaṁḍru stitāśēṣavi
dvaṁNmahājanālakuṁnnu śrī trilōcana
pura pratigrahalabdhamaina brā(ṁ)hmalamuḍi
yyaṁ Anēṭi sarvvamānya Agrahāramaṁdula
śrī sōmēśvarudēvuniki śrīśaila siṁhvā
sanasthulaina bhikṣāvrittiAyyavāri śiṣyu
laina ratnagiri vīramuṣṭi būmaya ko
māruṁḍu cinabasuvayya dhāravōśi
Icina dharmaśāsanakrama meṭlaṁnnanu svastisama
stanijanāmāṁkamālikāpraśastasahitulaina śrī
madgaṇēśvaradēva gaurīśvaradēvara divyaśrīpāda pa
dmārādhakulaina Ayyāvaḷimukhyamaina cālu
mūlasamastapekaṁḍra saṁmmatiniṁnni sakalapu
rāṁttakula saṁmmatini brāṁhmalamuḍi
yyaṁ grāmamaṁddu taṁmaḷlu modalainavā
ru Accēṭi vīramuṣṭipaṁnnu muḍiyyaṁ sō
mēśvaradēvuniki dīpārādhanaku sakaḷapurā
ṁtakulaku puṁṇyaṁgānuṁnnu juṁjuṁnuṁ
gāśinu nārasamuṁnu mōṭupalakānu paṭṭiḍi
vīramuṣṭulaku puṁṇyaṁgānuṁnu yī tatsaṁ
vatsara śrāvaṇa ba 8 Ādivāraṁnāḍu śrī kri
ṣṇajayaṁti puṇyakālamaṁdu śrī
sōmēśvaradēvara saṁnidhini sakalavīra
muṣṭulaku puṁṇyaṁgānu I dharmma
ṁ ĀcaṁdrārkkastāIgānu I Agra
hāramaṁdula stitāśēṣavidvaṁN
mahājanālamuṁdaranuṁ trikara
ṇasudhigānu trivācakaṁgānu The stone is built in.
Digital edition of SII 16.179 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
